subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou hadst written became clear and evident. It was not a letter, but a lamentation; it was not a mere statement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی واضح و معلوم شد نامه نبود ناله بود بیان نبود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
